name: Hema
description: A bloodsucker. This symbiotic burst-rifle leeches health to forge its ammo and then restores health with each headshot.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A bloodsucker. This symbiotic burst-rifle leeches health to forge its ammo and then restores health with each headshot.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Mutagen Mass
components.description:
This living mass can produce weaponized toxins for weaponry.

Location: Clan Research (Bio Lab in the Dojo) and Infested Outbreak Invasion Rewards

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Hema not restoring health on headshots against enemies with Overguard.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect Energy color on the Hema muzzle flash light.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.additions: Added FX to Hema headshots to give it a nice leechy feel!
patchlogs.changes: More fixes towards reducing max Ammo Mods affecting the Hema Ammo pool leading to incomplete clip reloads.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some issues reported with the Hema Ammo mechanic. Essentially increasing Clip size Mods or reducing max Ammo Mods would affect the Ammo pool leading to incomplete clip reloads. Also, the Ammo pool could get into a bad state if you were knocked back/down while in the reload animation.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.4.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Moon Clans seeing negative Nano Spore research numbers for the Hema. This was purely a UI bug.
